title: verbascum cylindrocarpum
intro: Verbascum cylindrocarpum, also known as cylindrical mullein, is a plant species belonging to the mullein family. It is a biennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and flowers, which are rich in saponins and flavonoids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Verbascum cylindrocarpum are often used in infusions, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
